name: anarchy-ai
description: Windows-first local delivery plugin for Anarchy-AI, the runtime framework harness for preflight, gap assessment, active-work compilation, schema reality, and gov2gov reconciliation.

interface.shortDescription: Windows-first runtime harness for preflight, gap assessment, active-work compilation, schema reality, and gov2gov reconciliation
interface.longDescription: Installs Anarchy-AI, the runtime framework harness for the AGENTS Heuristic Underlay. The schema family remains the canonical layer, the underlay remains the operative layer built from it, and Anarchy-AI preflights meaningful governed work, assesses install and adoption gaps, compiles active work, evaluates schema reality, and runs non-destructive gov2gov reconciliation through a local MCP lane.
defaultPrompt: Use Anarchy-AI as the runtime framework harness for the AGENTS Heuristic Underlay.
Run preflight_session before meaningful governed work so the harness decides whether the repo and session are ready.
Use assess_harness_gap_state when install, runtime, schema, or adoption state is unclear.
Compile the active work state into a bounded packet before continuing from messy session context.
Check whether the local schema package is real, aligned, or possessed before trusting it.
Plan or apply non-destructive gov2gov reconciliation when the schema package is partial, copied_only, or possessed.
